title: lippia plicata var. acuminata
intro: Lippia plicata var. acuminata, also known as the shrub verbena, is a variety of shrub-like plant belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lippia plicata var. acuminata include treating digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
